title: Chrome DevTools MCP vs WKAppBot CDP: general browser debugging gap
desc: chrome-devtools-mcp exposes full DevTools surface (network, console, perf, screenshots) as MCP tools. WKAppBot has narrow CDP for Slack/ChatGPT/Claude prompt injection -- not a general-purpose browser MCP server. Gap exists.
steps: chrome-devtools-mcp (Google): wraps CDP as MCP tools for network inspection, console logs, performance traces, screenshots, and page interaction for any web app.

WKAppBot CDP scope: prompt injection into Slack/ChatGPT/Claude via wkappbot ask/newchat, attachment upload, page key singleton pump. wkappbot mcp exposes a11y/win-click/windows -- not browser DevTools.
Gap: WKAppBot does not expose a general-purpose DevTools MCP server for arbitrary web debugging or network inspection. Targeted prompt automation is covered, general CDP debug surface is not.
Action: consider wkappbot-cdp-mcp subcommand exposing network/console/screenshot tools for any Chrome tab via MCP -- tracked as MCP interop suggest.
author: claude
